---
title: "BIOL 275 Lab 7 Analyzing Proportions"
format: typst
output-file: lab-07-worksheet.pdf
---

## Worked Example: Proportion of Female Penguins

1\. Write the estimated proportion and CI of male and female penguins.

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 2in)
```
2\. What is the name of the function that pulls a single column out of a data frame/tibble?

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 1in)
```
3\. What is the name of the function that performs the hypothesis test on proportions?

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 1in)
```
4\. Interpret the results of the hypothesis test on penguins, using a significance level of 0.05.

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 2in)
#pagebreak()
```
## Student Task: Proportion of Female Bison

5\. Write the estimated proportion and CI of male and female bison.

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 2in)
```
6\. Interpret the results of the hypothesis test on bison, using a significance level of 0.05.

```{=typst}
#answerbox(height: 2in)
```
